headline: Woman's 'Before And After' Gym Photo Uses Same Picture, Nobody Notices
summary: She's been posting the same photo for 8 months with captions like 'grind never stops.'
fullBody: Fitness influencer Brittany Repost has built a following of 400k using the same 'progress photo' recycled for 2 years. 'It's about mindset, not physique,' Repost explained. Her '6-month transformation' from last week was the same photo from 3 months ago, which was also the same photo from last year. Fans have started noticing that her 'new' tattoo disappears and reappears depending on the post. Brittany blames 'the lighting.'
